overall.description: A first-person perspective walk through a foggy urban street at night in a video game environment. The camera moves steadily past streetlights, parked vehicles, and commercial buildings with atmospheric artificial lighting and hazy visibility.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban sidewalk alongside brick commercial building

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the sidewalk next to a brick building, approaching a parked red vehicle ahead

tall metal street lamp illuminating the foggy area with bright light
metal public trash can on the sidewalk
elevated highway overpass visible in the distance through the fog
red sedan parked on the left side of the street ahead

segments.scene_description: The segment begins on a foggy urban sidewalk at night, with a brick building wall on the left and street furniture including a lamp post and trash can. The camera moves forward toward a distant overpass, with a red parked car visible ahead through the haze.

events.description: passing the red parked car on the left side

agents.ego_description: continuing forward past the red vehicle as the brick wall ends and the street opens up toward a commercial area

entered.detail: brightly lit commercial building with large windows and canopy, likely a gas station or convenience store

segments.scene_description: The camera passes the red parked car and moves beyond the brick building section. The street opens up as a brightly lit commercial building becomes visible in the distance through the fog, while the street lamp recedes to the left rear.

events.description: approaching the lit commercial building and street intersection

agents.ego_description: approaching the intersection and the brightly lit commercial building on the left

entered.detail: traffic signal showing red light at the intersection ahead
dark colored sedan parked on the right side near the intersection

segments.scene_description: The final segment approaches a street intersection with a brightly lit gas station or convenience store on the left. A traffic light becomes visible on the right as the camera moves toward the crosswalk, with the overpass and red car now behind in the foggy distance.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous forward movement through a foggy urban street at night that transitions from a narrow sidewalk into a brightly lit commercial intersection. It begins beside a brick building wall and street furniture, moving through the haze toward a distant overpass and a parked red car. As the camera passes the vehicle and the brick facade recedes, the street opens up to reveal the glow of a commercial building emerging from the fog. The scene then shifts toward a street intersection, where the dimness gives way to the vivid lights of a gas station on the left and a traffic light on the right. Finally, the camera approaches the crosswalk, leaving the overpass and the red car behind in the thickening mist.
